containment: SCP-173 is to be kept in a locked container at all times. When personnel must enter SCP-173's container, no fewer than 3 may enter at any time and the door is to be relocked behind them. At least one personnel must maintain direct eye contact with SCP-173 at all times. Personnel are forbidden from blinking while in the presence of SCP-173.
description: SCP-173 is constructed from concrete and rebar with traces of Krylon brand spray paint. It is animate and extremely hostile. The object cannot move while within a direct line of sight. Line of sight must not be broken at any time with SCP-173. Personnel assigned to enter container are instructed to alert one another before blinking. Object is reported to attack by snapping the neck at the base of the skull, or strangulation.

containment: SCP-096 is to be contained in its cell, a 5m x 5m x 5m airtight steel cube, at all times. Weekly checks for any cracks or holes are mandatory. No photograph, video, or digital representation of SCP-096's face may exist. Any such material must be immediately destroyed. In the event of a breach, personnel must not look at SCP-096's face under any circumstances.
description: SCP-096 is a humanoid creature measuring approximately 2.38 meters in height. It is normally docile and non-hostile, and will sit in the corner of its cell and weep. However, if any individual views SCP-096's face — whether directly, via photograph, or in any form of media — SCP-096 will enter a state of extreme distress and pursue that individual to any location on Earth. No material or structure has been capable of impeding SCP-096 in this state.

containment: SCP-049 is to be contained in a standard secure humanoid containment cell within Site-19. Interaction requires Level 2 clearance minimum and must be approved by at least two senior personnel. During interaction, SCP-049 must be restrained by mechanical arms. SCP-049 is permitted writing implements for communication purposes only.
description: SCP-049 appears to be a humanoid entity bearing the appearance of a medieval plague doctor, wearing a dark robe and a white ceramic mask. It is capable of speech in several languages and displays considerable intelligence. SCP-049 claims to be able to sense a 'Pestilence' it believes is affecting humanity. Physical contact from SCP-049's bare hands results in immediate death of the subject, after which SCP-049 will attempt to perform a surgical procedure on the corpse.

containment: SCP-106 is to be contained in a sealed container lined with lead-lined steel. The container must be magnetically locked and monitored by camera at all times. No physical contact with SCP-106 is permitted. In the event of a containment breach, the Femur Breaker protocol is to be initiated immediately to lure SCP-106 back to its containment unit.
description: SCP-106 appears as an elderly humanoid covered in a dark, corroded substance, exhibiting severe physical decomposition. SCP-106 is capable of phasing through solid matter, leaving behind a corrosive, black substance. It tends to retreat to its pocket dimension, a labyrinthine space under SCP-106's control, with captured victims. Victims returned from this dimension show extreme psychological trauma and random physical damage, often fatal.

containment: SCP-682 must be destroyed as soon as possible. Until a reliable termination method is found, SCP-682 is to be contained in a 5m x 5m x 5m chamber filled with hydrochloric acid. The chamber must be reinforced with blast-resistant materials. Personnel must avoid any unnecessary interaction with SCP-682. Termination attempts require O5 approval.
description: SCP-682 is a large, vaguely reptilian creature of unknown origin. It is highly intelligent and shows intense hatred toward all life. SCP-682 has demonstrated the ability to adapt to virtually any method of attack or containment, rapidly regenerating from any damage inflicted upon it. SCP-682 communicates in several languages and has made clear its intent to destroy all life. All termination attempts have thus far failed.
